circuits.designation: Meeting room 1 power + AV — Schuko radial
Meeting room 2 power + AV — Schuko radial
Kitchenette appliances — Schuko worktop radial + FCU
Server cabinet small-power (UPS-fed; Type B RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — matches db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy)
Toilet shaver supply (BS EN 61558-2-5 SSU) — dedicated radial
Outdoor IP65 sockets (smoking + bin store) — Schuko radial

non_compliance_flags.message: C06 server-room small-power applies Type B 30 mA RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — UPS rectifier front-ends and SMPS-fed IT loads produce smooth DC residual currents that blind Type A/F RCDs. This mirrors the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy at db-layout v1.3.0+ (cross-skill alignment documented even though small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill with no upstream intent consumption).

Toilet classified bathroom_zone_3 per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512. Only the BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver supply unit (SSU) is installed; no general-purpose Schuko sockets within 3 m of zone 1 boundary. INV-05 satisfied.
Outdoor sockets (C08) installed with IP65 enclosure per BS EN 60529 / IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §512.2 for external exposure to rain and dust. All Type A 30 mA RCD protection per §411.3.3.

All eight circuits configured as radial (none ring) per INT engineering convention — IEC 60364 does not include a BS 7671-style ring final circuit construct. INV-04 (ring restricted to GB/KE) satisfied trivially.

Zs verification deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance per WI3. Per-circuit tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=true; loop impedance to be confirmed at install per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.4.5 and §612.6.3.

assumptions: Utility-declared Ze=0.25 Ω at the parent DB DB-FLOOR-01 earthing terminal; not yet site-measured (verification per IEC 60364-6:2016 Chapter 6).
Utility-declared PSCC=10 kA at DB-FLOOR-01 busbar; all MCBs selected with 10 kA Icu per IEC 60898-1 product range to satisfy IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1.
All eight circuits configured radial; IEC 60364 does not provide a ring-final equivalent to BS 7671 §433.1.5 — radial is the INT default.

Diversity per IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 design margin estimates; workstation positions ~125 W coincident at ~70% utilisation; kitchenette ~11 A simultaneous (kettle + microwave non-coincident + fridge); meeting-room AV ~6.5 A.
Toilet bathroom_zone_3 holds only the shaver SSU per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512; no general Schuko outlets in the toilet.
Outdoor sockets enclosure IP65 per BS EN 60529 with weatherproof flap; Type A 30 mA RCD; cable routes assumed Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A.

C06 server-room small-power applies Type B RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — engineer mirrors the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy without v1.0 multi-skill intent consumption (cross-skill alignment via convention; small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill).

Drafting follows ISO 19650:2018 + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 as the INT convention for layered electrical drawings; a future drafting-standards deferred sprint will revisit ISO-only layer naming (AIA / ISO 5457 / ISO 5455).

drawing_notes: All workstation Schuko sockets are floor-box mounted (mount=floor, 0 mm AFFL) — typical INT open-plan office practice with raised access floor or floor cores; each floor box hosts 2× Schuko + data; 12 boxes per zone.
Meeting-room low-level sockets at 300 mm AFFL on wall; AV socket on rear wall at 1200 mm AFFL for ceiling-projector / wall-display feed.
Kitchenette worktop sockets at 1100 mm AFFL (150 mm above 950 mm worktop); under-counter fridge fed via 16 A FCU at 300 mm AFFL on C05.
Server-room small-power sockets at 600 mm AFFL on wall behind rack; UPS-fed; Type B 30 mA RCD on circuit C06 per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3.
Toilet bathroom_zone_3 SSU (BS EN 61558-2-5) at 1400 mm AFFL on wall — no general Schuko within 3 m of zone 1 per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512.
Outdoor sockets in IP65 weatherproof enclosure (BS EN 60529) at 1200 mm AFFL on external wall — smoking shelter and bin store.
Layer naming follows ISO 19650:2018 federation pattern + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 discipline-element-modifier: E-POW-OUTLET-L01, E-POW-CIRCUIT-L01, E-POW-ZONE-BATH, E-POW-DB-L01.

rationale.chat_summary: INT 350 m² commercial open-plan office floor. 400V TPN+E TN-S, Ze=0.25Ω, PSCC=10kA. 8 radial circuits per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.3.3. C01-C02 workstation 20A; C03-C04 meeting rooms 16A; C05 kitchenette 20A; C06 server-room UPS-fed with Type B 30mA RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 (matches db-layout intl-dbcomms-data); C07 toilet shaver SSU 6A; C08 outdoor IP65 16A. ISO 19650:2018 layer naming. calc.zs_loop_impedance pending.

sections.title: Jurisdiction + Supply
sections.summary: INT jurisdiction; IEC 60364 series is the primary code. Utility TN-S 400V TPN+E supply with declared Ze=0.25 Ω and PSCC=10.0 kA at the DB-FLOOR-01 busbar. IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1 sets the short-circuit verification rule — all MCBs Icu ≥ 10 kA via the IEC 60898-1 product range.

decisions.label: TN-S supply confirmed
decisions.summary: Utility provides dedicated PE conductor separate from N at the parent DB earthing terminal; no PEN combination on site.

decisions.label: PSCC 10 kA → all MCBs ≥ 10 kA Icu
decisions.summary: Declared 10 kA at the DB-FLOOR-01 busbar; every MCB must have a breaking capacity ≥ 10 kA per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1; product compliance via IEC 60898-1.
decisions.rule: OCPD breaking capacity ≥ prospective fault current

sections.title: Circuit Topology
sections.summary: Eight final circuits, all radial (none ring). C01-C02 cover the two workstation zones; C03-C04 cover the two meeting rooms; C05 kitchenette; C06 dedicated_radial for the server cabinet UPS-fed small-power (Type B isolation); C07 dedicated_radial for the toilet shaver SSU; C08 outdoor IP65. IEC 60364 has no ring-final equivalent to BS 7671 §433.1.5, so radial is the INT default.

decisions.label: Radial-only topology
decisions.summary: INT engineering convention uses radial finals throughout; INV-04 (ring restricted to GB/KE) satisfied trivially. Selectivity at DB-FLOOR-01 is cleaner with per-circuit MCBs.

decisions.label: Dedicated radials for C06 (server) and C07 (SSU)
decisions.summary: Server cabinet small-power isolated on its own MCB (Type B RCD upstream) for IT-load discrimination; toilet shaver SSU isolated on a 6 A radial to limit fault energy in the Part 7-701 zone.
decisions.rule: Dedicated final circuit for isolated SELV/SSU and IT loads

sections.title: Special Locations
sections.summary: Two classes of special location appear in this design: (a) the toilet, classified bathroom_zone_3 per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512 — only the BS EN 61558-2-5 SSU is installed; (b) outdoor sockets on C08 with IP65 enclosure per BS EN 60529 + IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §512.2 for rain and dust exposure. No bathroom_zone_1 or _2 sockets exist on this floor.

decisions.label: Toilet zone 3 — SSU only
decisions.summary: Toilet (3.0×2.5 m) sits entirely within 3 m of any hypothetical zone 1 boundary; only the SSU is installed (explicitly excepted by §701.512). INV-05 satisfied.
decisions.rule: Shaver supply exception for bathroom zone 3

decisions.label: Outdoor sockets IP65 weatherproof
decisions.summary: Smoking shelter and bin-store sockets exposed to rain — IP65 enclosure with flap closure per BS EN 60529; Type A 30 mA RCD per §411.3.3.

sections.title: RCD Posture
sections.summary: Seven of eight circuits use Type A 30 mA RCD per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.3.3 (socket outlets ≤ 32 A). C06 server-room uses Type B 30 mA per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — UPS rectifier front-ends + SMPS IT loads produce smooth DC residuals that blind Type A/F. Mirrors db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy (cross-skill alignment by convention; small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill).

decisions.label: Type A 30 mA on 7 circuits
decisions.summary: C01-C05, C07, C08 — workstation/meeting-room/kitchenette/SSU/outdoor loads can produce pulsating-DC residuals; Type A is the IEC 60364 baseline for general socket-outlet circuits ≤ 32 A.
decisions.rule: Additional protection by 30 mA RCD for socket outlets

decisions.label: Type B 30 mA on C06 (server-room)
decisions.summary: UPS-fed IT loads (PoE+ injectors, SMPS-fed servers, UPS rectifier front-end) inject smooth DC into the protective conductor and would blind a Type A RCD — Type B (DC-sensitive) is mandatory per §531.3.3. This matches the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped form exactly.
decisions.rule: RCD type selection for IT loads with DC leakage

sections.title: OCPD + Cable
sections.summary: C01/C02/C05/C06: 20 A MCB C + 2.5 mm² Cu PVC. C03/C04/C08: 16 A MCB C + 2.5 mm² Cu PVC. C07: 6 A MCB B + 1.5 mm² Cu PVC. All MCBs Icu 10 kA per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1 + IEC 60898-1. Curve C on Schuko circuits handles SMPS/AV/kitchen inrush; Curve B on C07 SSU gives best Zs margin against small isolating-transformer load.

decisions.label: 20 A radial sized 2.5 mm² Cu PVC
decisions.summary: 2.5 mm² Cu PVC gives ~24 A current-carrying capacity in Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A — adequate headroom against a 20 A MCB at the radial lengths quoted (≤ 30 m).

decisions.label: All MCBs 10 kA Icu
decisions.summary: PSCC = 10 kA at DB-FLOOR-01 busbar; MCBs must meet ≥ 10 kA Icu per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1 and IEC 60898-1.

decisions.label: Curve C for Schuko circuits, Curve B for SSU
decisions.summary: Type C (5-10×In) covers SMPS / AV / kitchen-appliance inrush without nuisance trip; Type B (3-5×In) on C07 gives best Zs disconnection margin against the tiny SSU load.
decisions.rule: MCB curve selection for load profile

sections.title: Diversity + Zs
sections.summary: Diversity per IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 estimates: workstation zones ~10 A; meeting rooms ~6.5 A; kitchenette ~11 A (kettle + microwave non-coincident + fridge); server-room ~9 A; outdoor ~1.7 A. Zs verification deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance per WI3 — every circuit has tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=true; flags[] carries the TOOL-CALL-PENDING marker.

decisions.label: Kitchenette diversified to 11 A
decisions.summary: Kettle 2 kW + microwave 0.8 kW (non-coincident) + fridge 0.2 kW; worst-case ~2.6 kW at 230 V single-phase = 11.3 A against 20 A MCB.

decisions.label: Zs deferred to calc.zs_loop_impedance
decisions.summary: Loop impedance Zs = Ze + (R1+R2) computed by the calc skill; all eight circuits flagged TOOL-CALL-PENDING. INV-08 satisfied.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: compliant=true. Five info flags: (a) C06 Type B RCD + cross-skill alignment with db-layout intl-dbcomms-data, (b) toilet bathroom_zone_3 SSU-only, (c) outdoor IP65, (d) radial-only topology, (e) deferred Zs verification. Eight assumptions documented; utility-declared Ze and PSCC to be verified at first energisation per IEC 60364-6:2016.

decisions.label: Cross-skill alignment with db-layout (Type B RCD)
decisions.summary: Although small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill (no upstream intent consumption), the engineer mirrors the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped Type B policy by convention. Citation form `IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3` is exactly identical to db-layout shipped output.
decisions.rule: Cross-skill consistency for IT-load RCD policy

decisions.label: Ze and PSCC declared, not measured
decisions.summary: Utility-declared values used for design; on-site verification at first energisation per IEC 60364-6:2016 Chapter 6.

sections.title: Drafting References
sections.summary: Single A1 sheet at 1:100 metric scale; 350 m² floor plate fits with circuit schedule and notes. Layer naming follows ISO 19650:2018 federation pattern + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 discipline-element-modifier convention — the INT industry default for layered electrical drawings. A future drafting-standards deferred sprint will revisit ISO-only layer naming (AIA / ISO 5457 / ISO 5455).

decisions.label: A1 @ 1:100 single-sheet output
decisions.summary: 350 m² floor plate fits comfortably on one A1 sheet at 1:100 with panel schedule, notes block, and the Part 7-701 zone overlay.
decisions.rule: ISO 19650:2018 federation pattern + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 layered drawing conventions
